title: PRD: Slack integration
text:
# PRD — Slack integration
Product area: Integrations
Status: Approved
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request slack integration. This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the Integrations area.

## Proposed solution
Implement slack integration with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce Integrations-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Committed for next quarter.
